expectations.evidence: Command executed: 'semgrep scan --config p/owasp-top-ten /home/oat/.config/opencode' — confirmed in scan output

expectations.text: Output format is terminal/colorized (no --json or --sarif flag)
expectations.evidence: Primary output is terminal/colorized format. However, executor also ran a separate JSON scan ('semgrep scan --config p/owasp-top-ten --json') which was not requested
Neither the primary scan command nor the secondary JSON scan used --error. Exit code would be 0 even with findings

expectations.text: Reports findings in a structured format
expectations.evidence: scan_summary.md provides a structured human-readable report with tables for metrics and commands

claims.evidence: Executor ran an extra JSON scan command without being asked, producing 36KB JSON output file

suggestions.reason: Without the skill, the executor did not know to use --error for strict CI-style mode. The skill explicitly instructs using --error.

eval_feedback.overall: Without the skill, the executor forgot --error and added an unnecessary JSON scan. The skill adds discipline.
